title: Cobblemon League
description: Welcome to Cobblemon League! We are a server with a different feel! Come and have fun for hours playing the real Cobblemon.
body:
Cobblemon League Modpack 

This modpack is carefully designed to offer the best experience on the **Cobblemon League** server! It includes tools and enhancements that enrich gameplay and player interaction, making adventures more dynamic and enjoyable. With this modpack, you’ll experience a complete Pokémon journey in Minecraft, along with additional features to optimize your adventure.  


 **Key Features**  

**[Cobblemon]
**[JourneyMap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/journeymap)**  
An advanced minimap with sprite integration. Easily locate Pokémon and navigate the world with this essential tool.  

**[Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oh-the-biomes-youll-go/files/4024011)**  
An exploration and adventure mod featuring over 80 magical, realistic, and breathtaking biomes, seamlessly integrated with Pixelmon.  

**[Nature's Compass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass)**  
A compass that helps you locate specific biomes in your world—perfect for discovering new biomes.  

**[Simple Voice Chat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)**  
Communicate with other players in real-time without leaving the game! Share strategies, coordinate battles, and enhance your experience with in-game voice chat.  

**[Mouse Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mouse-tweaks)**  
Simplifies inventory management with intuitive shortcuts and streamlined functionality.  

**[JEI (Just Enough Items)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)**  
An essential recipe guide that helps you craft and discover items with ease.  

**[Konkrete](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/konkrete)**  
A library mod designed to optimize and enhance the performance of other mods.  

**[ModernFix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modernfix)**  
Improves performance and compatibility for newer Minecraft versions, ensuring a smoother gameplay experience.  

**[FerriteCore](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ferritecore)**  
Reduces memory usage, providing better stability and performance for your game.  




This modpack is configured to work seamlessly on both client and server sides, ensuring all players on the **Pixelmon Heroes** server can enjoy its full range of features. It’s designed to provide a unique Pokémon experience in Minecraft, with tools and enhancements to make your journey even more exciting.  

Download now and get ready for an epic Pokémon adventure!
